comment: XWidget EL (Expression Language) — injected into XML attribute values and text. Ports the .flex lexer from the IntelliJ plugin to TextMate. Stateless, so the AFTER_DOT distinction is implemented via lookahead patterns rather than lexer states. Bracket-depth diagnostics are not implemented (TextMate is stateless); they would belong to a future semantic tokens provider.

el-expression.comment: The ${ ... } block. begin/end gives us proper containment so a stray } in the surrounding XML doesn't get colored as EL_END.
el-expression.name: meta.embedded.expression.xwidget-el

patterns.comment: Single-quoted string with backslash escapes — matches STRING_LITERAL in the .flex grammar.
patterns.name: string.quoted.single.xwidget-el

patterns.comment: Numeric literal: integer or decimal — matches NUMBER_LITERAL.
patterns.name: constant.numeric.xwidget-el

operators.comment: Order matters here — multi-character operators must come before single-character ones. The HTML-entity form && is included to handle EL inside XML attributes that have been entity-escaped.

identifiers.comment: Three flavours of identifier, distinguished by what's before and after them. Order matters — method (after dot, before paren) must come before plain method (after dot) which must come before function (before paren) which must come before plain property.

patterns.comment: Method call: an identifier preceded by '.' and followed by '(' — analogous to AFTER_DOT + IDENTIFIER( in the .flex lexer.
patterns.name: entity.name.function.method.xwidget-el

patterns.comment: Property access after a dot — covers both YYINITIAL .property and AFTER_DOT IDENTIFIER (no paren after).
patterns.name: variable.other.property.xwidget-el

patterns.comment: Function call: identifier followed by ( and not preceded by a dot — analogous to YYINITIAL IDENTIFIER( in the .flex lexer.
patterns.name: entity.name.function.xwidget-el

patterns.comment: Plain property/variable reference — the YYINITIAL IDENTIFIER fallback.
patterns.name: variable.other.xwidget-el
